ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When off, the progress bar shows only on notes that have their own goal property
ast.target: 关闭时，进度条仅显示在拥有自己目标属性的笔记上

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this property exists in a note's frontmatter, its value is used as the word goal for that file
ast.target: 如果笔记的前置信息中存在此属性，则其值将用作该文件的字数目标

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use default word goal for all files
ast.target: 为所有文件使用默认字数目标

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 用于单个文件目标的前置信息键
